AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Rong kid
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: Just like many other Rongs, {PAWN_nameDef} did not remember much about {PAWN_possessive} childhood. {PAWN_pronoun} grew up in Rong's underground settlement, and never got to see the sky or the sun.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: researcher on vacation
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef} served in the Cult of Knowing. The stressful research tasks exhausted {PAWN_objective}. {PAWN_pronoun} took a leave and joined the raiding group. Now {PAWN_pronoun} can enjoy the pure fun of killing.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: automata engineer
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef} spent many years improving the Rong automata, making them kill faster while costing less. To see the performance of {PAWN_possessive} creation, {PAWN_pronoun} joined the raids and fought alongside the berserkers and automatas.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: anxious raider
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef} has suffered from anxiety since {PAWN_pronoun} became an adult. When {PAWN_pronoun} killed an enemy for the first time, {PAWN_pronoun} found that {PAWN_pronoun} was able to relieve {PAWN_possessive} anxiety by killing. Since then, {PAWN_pronoun} has not shown mercy to {PAWN_possessive} opponents.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: sword dancer
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef} was a dancer in the Cult of Pleasure. {PAWN_pronoun} turned sword fighting moves into an elaborate acrobatic dance and entertained many. {PAWN_pronoun} brought {PAWN_possessive} greatsword to many fights, bathed in enemies' blood, just to get inspiration for the new dance.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: heavy gunner
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef} was a warrior of the Cult of Steel. Which means in battle, {PAWN_pronoun} would always be accompanied by automatas. {PAWN_pronoun} used automatas as meat shields and shot from a safe distance.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: leatherworker
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef} worked at the Cult of Glamor, where {PAWN_pronoun} made clothes from leather, one of Rongs' favorite materials. Although Rongs tend to use synthetic leather, {PAWN_nameDef} has a special fascination with the real thing. Sometimes, {PAWN_pronoun} would skin the dead enemy and keep a small part as a trophy.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: prosthetist
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef} made and fit artificial limbs for Rong warriors. {PAWN_possessive} job required years of practice and {PAWN_pronoun} barely had any time left to do social activities.
